name: EdgeAdjacency
summary: Enumerates all possible Topological Edge adjacency types.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Edge is not used by any faces and is therefore superfluous.

enum_values.name: Naked
enum_values.summary: Edge is used by a single face.

enum_values.name: Interior
enum_values.summary: Edge is used by two adjacent faces.

enum_values.name: NonManifold
enum_values.summary: Edge is used by three or more adjacent faces.
